name: ats-resume-builder
description: Full-stack MERN ATS Resume Builder & Analyzer — build resumes, score them against job descriptions, get keyword suggestions, and export to PDF.

scripts.dev: node ./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
